additional_rules.name: sync-endpoint-handler
additional_rules.message: Synchronous endpoint handler (def instead of async def) in router — use async def for non-blocking I/O
additional_rules.fix_hint: Change `def handler(...)` to `async def handler(...)` and await any I/O calls inside.

additional_rules.name: raw-dict-response
additional_rules.message: Raw dict returned from endpoint — use a Pydantic response model for type safety and documentation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Define a Pydantic BaseModel subclass (e.g., XxxResponse) and return it instead of a raw dict.

additional_rules.name: persistence-import-in-router
additional_rules.message: Persistence layer import in router — routers should not access the database layer directly
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move database access to a repository or service. Routers should only depend on services.

additional_rules.name: print-in-production
additional_rules.message: print() in application code — use structured logging instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace print() with logging.getLogger(__name__).info() or structlog equivalent.
